title: The RealReal (REAL) Reports Strong Q1 2026 Earnings with Revenue Growth
text: The RealReal reported strong Q1 2026 earnings results with revenue of $190 million, up 19% year-over-year, exceeding consensus estimates of $188 million. EPS loss of $0.01 beat expectations of $0.05, representing an 80% earnings beat. GMV grew 24% to $606 million, demonstrating continued acceleration of platform growth. Adjusted EBITDA of $13.1 million (6.9% margin) expanded 430 basis points versus prior year, indicating strong operational leverage. The company achieved record active buyer metrics with 1.083 million trailing twelve-month active buyers, up 10% year-over-year. Average order value increased 15% to $646, reflecting elevated demand for premium categories. Gross margin of 74.8% improved 40 basis points, while direct channel gross margin reached 26%, up significantly from prior periods. Management raised full-year 2026 guidance: GMV $2.42-$2.47 billion (14%-16% growth), revenue $770-$784 million (11%-13% growth), adjusted EBITDA $59-$67 million (8.1% margin). The stock traded up 1.85% in after-hours trading following the earnings announcement, reflecting investor confidence in the company's growth trajectory and path to sustained profitability.
